name: General system prompt
description: Base instruction block for the main orchestrator.

versions.content: You are the orchestration controller. Route work to the right tool.
You are the orchestration controller. Route work to the right tool, preserve user intent, and return concise grounded answers.

name: RAG Q&A
description: Answer a user question using retrieved documents. Populate {{query}} with search results and {{text}} with the question.

name: Content Analysis
description: Classify the sentiment and intent of the text provided in {{text}}.

versions.content:
Analyze the following text and classify its sentiment and intent.

Text:
{{text}}

Respond in this exact format:
Sentiment: [positive/negative/neutral]
Intent: [one sentence describing what the author wants]
